author: suctl
description: Manages fail2ban jails, banned IPs, and protection parameters.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.survey
capabilities.description: Render the jail landscape for the survey: suctl-managed and foreign jails (with live ban counts and effective tunables) plus uninstalled catalog recipes shown as 'available' with a create action. Each row is tagged with applicable facet values; core filters locally.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected jail (config, tunables, live ban list, dynamic actions).

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.create
capabilities.description: Create a jail from the catalog: install its filter and a disabled jail.d drop-in (no jail.local touch).

params.name: jail
params.description: Catalog jail name (e.g. nginx-scanner, nginx-http-error, odoo-server)

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.delete
capabilities.description: Delete a jail: remove its jail.d drop-in (and its suctl-provided filter, for catalog jails). suctl acts as the operator's hand — any jail may be deleted.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.activate
capabilities.description: Enable a jail via its highest-precedence jail.d drop-in (enabled=true) and load it into the running server with `fail2ban-client reload` (the server is config-agnostic and cannot read config itself). Works for any jail without touching jail.local.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.deactivate
capabilities.description: Disable a jail via its highest-precedence jail.d drop-in (enabled=false) and stop it over the fail2ban socket. Works for any jail without touching jail.local.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.jail.set
capabilities.description: Set a tunable (maxretry, bantime, findtime) via the jail's jail.d drop-in, and apply it live over the socket when the jail is running.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.catalog.list
capabilities.description: List the curated catalog of suctl-provided jails (each with its bundled filter).

capabilities.name: fail2ban.banned_ip.survey
capabilities.description: Render the banned-IP landscape for the survey (live bans across all jails).

capabilities.name: fail2ban.banned_ip.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected banned IP (which jails hold it, since when, dynamic actions).

params.name: subject
params.description: Banned IP address to focus on

capabilities.name: fail2ban.banned.ban
capabilities.description: Ban an IP in a jail at runtime over the fail2ban socket.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.banned.unban
capabilities.description: Unban an IP over the fail2ban socket, optionally scoped to one jail.

params.name: jail
params.description: Jail name (omit to unban from all jails)

capabilities.name: fail2ban.ignoreip.add
capabilities.description: Add an IP/CIDR to a jail's ignoreip (persisted to its jail.d drop-in) and reload it.

capabilities.name: fail2ban.ignoreip.remove
capabilities.description: Remove an IP/CIDR from a jail's ignoreip and reload it.
